zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Watkins於大約1520年出生在英國多瑟特梅爾波利 布布時，她的父親Humphrey Watkins21歲，母親Catherine Symonds19歲。她於1548年與Sir Allex Buckler在英國多瑟特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年2月5日在英國多瑟特享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Watkins于大约1520年出生在英国多瑟特梅爾波利 布布时，她的父亲Humphrey Watkins21岁，母亲Catherine Symonds19岁。她于1548年与Sir Allex Buckler在英国多瑟特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年2月5日在英国多瑟特享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Watkins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Watkin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Watkin
meanings: English and Welsh: from the personal name Watkin, a diminutive of Walter .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Watkins was born about 1520, in Melbury Bubb, Dorset, England, her father, Humphrey Watkins, was 21 and her mother, Catherine Symonds, was 19. She married Sir Allex Buckler in 1548, in Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 5 February 1597, in Dorset, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Watkins est née environ 1520, à Melbury Bubb, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Watkins, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Catherine Symonds, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Allex Buckler en 1548, à Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 février 1597, à Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Watkins um 1520 in Melbury Bubb, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey Watkins 21 und ihre Mutter Catherine Symonds 19. Sie hat 1548 in Dorset, England Sir Allex Buckler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Februar 1597 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Watkins è nata il circa 1520 nel Melbury Bubb, Dorset, England, sua padre, Humphrey Watkins, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Catherine Symonds, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Allex Buckler nel 1548, nel Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 febbraio 1597, nel Dorset, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Watkinsが約1520年にイギリスドールセトメルブリー ブブで生まれた時，父Humphrey Watkinsは21歳，母Catherine Symondsは19歳であった。1548年にイギリスドールセトでSir Allex Bucklerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1597年2月5日にイギリスドールセトで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Watkins(이)가 대략 1520년 영국 도르세트 멜버이 버브브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Watkins(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Symonds(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1548년 영국 도르세트에서 Sir Allex Buckler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 2월 5일 영국 도르세트에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Watkins nasceu aproximadamente 1520, em Melbury Bubb, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Watkins, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Symonds, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Allex Buckler em 1548, em Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1597, em Dorset, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Watkins родилась около 1520 г. в местности мелбури бубб, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Watkins было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Symonds, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Allex Buckler в 1548 г. в местности дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 5 февраля 1597 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Watkins nació aproximadamente 1520, en Melbury Bubb, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey Watkins, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Catherine Symonds, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir Allex Buckler en 1548, en Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1597, en Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
